extract: Tandemaus (Japanese: ワッカネズミ Wakkanezumi) is a Normal-type Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. It evolves into Maushold when leveled up in a battle starting at level 25. Tandemaus will evolve into one of two forms of Maushold, Family of Four or Family of Three, with a 1/100 chance of evolving into Family of Three Maushold. (Refer to Game data→Evolution data for more details.)
